meaning: n.恩人,捐助者,赠送者,赞助人
examples: Come over to our benefactor now.
In his old age he became a benefactor of the arts.
An anonymous benefactor stepped in to provide the prize money.
Which brings us to the curious case of the Indochina railway and its Kiwi benefactor.
China is the largest trading partner, economic benefactor and political supporter of North Korea.
